message:
fix: add caching, pagination, and client reuse to fetchLinkedPRs (#3369) (#3383)

fetchLinkedPRs made 2 uncached GitHub API calls per page load with no
pagination (silently missing PRs beyond the first 50 per state) and
allocated a new http.Client each time (bypassing connection pooling).

- Add a 5-minute TTL cache for fetched PR data (similar to missions cache)
- Paginate up to 5 pages (250 PRs) per state to catch all linked PRs
- Use a shared http.Client on FeedbackHandler for TCP connection reuse
- Stop early when a page returns fewer than 50 results

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
